When to use:

Diagnose and improve Java persistence performance with JPA, Hibernate, JDBC, transactions, and connection pools. Use when fixing slow queries, N+1 loading, missing indexes, transaction boundaries, fetch plans, batch writes, or database connection pool exhaustion.
